## Source: ghsa-malware (80a5760e90d52e1a7582e85ef17614f6d98ed6a40a45bd8703026817b8432059)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (b0ae0aeaeb46ba7f8b11f6d147563511507aba9c9464d22afe7caae70697ec8d)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'service-catalog-client' @ 0.7.0 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.

It is considered malicious because:

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
